situation: Created a plan document and presented it locally but did not upload to Drive. User had to ask where it was.
root_cause: Followed present_files without also calling upload_to_drive.py
solution: Always upload to Drive immediately after writing any output file, before or alongside present_files
lesson: present_files and upload_to_drive are not interchangeable — Drive upload is required for user access across sessions and devices. Never skip it.
